meta.title: Tutorio
meta.description: Financial calendar for private tutors and small schools

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back! Sign in to your workspace.

register.title: Create your workspace
register.subtitle: Start managing lessons, students and payments.
register.name: Your name
register.workspaceNameHint: For example, the name of your school or studio
register.passwordHint: At least 12 characters — a long passphrase works best

errors.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email is already registered. Try signing in instead.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.WORKSPACE_MEMBER_NOT_FOUND: This teacher is not a member of the workspace.
errors.ACTIVE_ENROLLMENTS_EXIST: Archive the active and paused enrollments first.
errors.INVALID_WORKSPACE_RELATION: This record belongs to another workspace.
errors.INVALID_REFRESH_TOKEN: Your session is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.UNEXPECTED: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
validation.passwordTooLong: Password must be at most 128 characters
validation.nameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters
validation.workspaceNameTooShort: Workspace name must be at least 2 characters
validation.workspaceNameTooLong: Workspace name must be at most 80 characters
validation.fullNameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters
validation.groupNameTooLong: Name must be at most 120 characters
validation.deadlineRange: Enter a number of hours between 0 and 336

pagination.label: Pagination
pagination.total: {count, plural, =0 {No records} one {# record} other {# records}}

dashboard.emptyDescription: Students, groups, calendar and finance will appear here in the next stages. For now, explore the navigation and account settings.

students.title: Students
students.subtitle: Everyone learning in your workspace.
students.count: {count, plural, =0 {No students} one {# student} other {# students}}
students.tableCaption: Workspace students with their groups and active enrollments
students.activeEnrollments: {count, plural, =0 {No active enrollments} one {# active enrollment} other {# active enrollments}}

empty.title: No students yet
empty.description: Add your first student to start building schedules and packages.

emptySearch.title: Nothing found
emptySearch.description: No students match your search. Try a different name or contact.

emptyDeleted.title: Trash is empty
emptyDeleted.description: Deleted students appear here and can be restored.

form.createSubtitle: Only the name and timezone are required.
form.timezoneHint: Lesson times are shown to the student in this timezone.
form.pricingHint: Default price for this student's lessons — an enrollment can still override it.
form.parentHint: Link an existing parent or create a new one.
form.subject: Subject

detail.enrollmentsDescription: Where this student learns and how they are billed.
detail.noEnrollmentsDescription: Connect this student to a group or an individual teacher.
detail.deadlineHours: {hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} before the lesson
detail.deletedTitle: This student is in the trash
detail.deletedDescription: Restore the student to edit them again.

deleteDialog.title: Move this student to trash?
deleteDialog.description: {name} will be hidden from lists but nothing is erased permanently. An owner can restore them at any time.

groups.title: Groups
groups.subtitle: Classes that several students attend together.
groups.tableCaption: Workspace groups with the number of enrolled students
groups.studentCount: {count, plural, =0 {No students} one {# student} other {# students}}

empty.title: No groups yet
empty.description: Create a group to bill several students under one class.

emptyDeleted.title: Trash is empty
emptyDeleted.description: Deleted groups appear here and can be restored.

form.createSubtitle: Give the group a name your students will recognise.
form.editSubtitle: Update the group name and notes.
form.name: Name
form.pricePerLessonHint: Default for this group's enrollments, e.g. 500 or 500.50

detail.membersDescription: Each student keeps their own price and billing rules.
detail.noMembersDescription: Add an existing student to this group.
detail.deletedTitle: This group is in the trash
detail.deletedDescription: Restore the group to edit it again.

deleteDialog.title: Move this group to trash?
deleteDialog.description: {name} will be hidden from lists but nothing is erased permanently. An owner can restore it at any time.

parents.title: Parents
parents.subtitle: Parents and guardians linked to your students.
parents.tableCaption: Workspace parents with their linked students

empty.title: No parents yet
empty.description: Add a parent to link them to one or more students.

emptySearch.title: Nothing found
emptySearch.description: No parents match your search. Try a different name or contact.

emptyDeleted.title: Trash is empty
emptyDeleted.description: Deleted parents appear here and can be restored.

form.notesPlaceholder: Anything worth remembering about this parent

detail.noStudentsDescription: Link this parent from a student's edit form.
detail.deletedTitle: This parent is in the trash
detail.deletedDescription: Restore the parent to edit them again.

deleteDialog.title: Move this parent to trash?
deleteDialog.description: {name} will be hidden from lists but nothing is erased permanently. An owner can restore them at any time.

editor.createDescription: Connect a student to a group or an individual teacher, with their own price and rules.
editor.editDescription: Change billing rules or the lifecycle status. The student, group and teacher cannot be moved.
editor.priceHint: Per lesson or per month, depending on the billing type.
editor.effective: Effective deadline: {hours, plural, one {# hour} other {# hours}} before the lesson.

deleteDialog.title: Move this enrollment to trash?
deleteDialog.description: Nothing is erased permanently. To end a relationship that really happened, set the status to Archived instead — archived enrollments stay visible in history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Workspace defaults and the audit trail.

general.title: Workspace defaults
general.description: New enrollments start from these values.
general.cancellationDeadlineHint: Hours before a lesson when a student can still cancel without being charged.
general.priceNotice: Existing enrollments keep the currency and price you configured for them — changing the default never rewrites them.
general.deadlineNotice: Enrollments without their own deadline will immediately follow the new default.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.description: Every change to students, groups, enrollments and settings.
audit.changeCount: {count, plural, one {# field changed} other {# fields changed}}

empty.title: Nothing recorded yet
empty.description: Changes appear here as soon as you edit students, groups or settings.

error.title: Could not load the audit log

ownerOnly.title: Owner access only
ownerOnly.description: Workspace settings and the audit log are available to the workspace owner.
